name: secapi.ai API catalog

families.title: Advisers
families.description: Reference pages for Advisers endpoints.

operations.title: GET /v1/advisers
operations.summary: Search SEC Form ADV investment adviser filings by name, CIK, or state

families.title: Agent
families.description: Reference pages for Agent endpoints.

operations.title: POST /v1/agent/bootstrap
operations.summary: Exchange a sponsor token for the first org-scoped API key, billing snapshot, limits, and MCP install metadata

operations.title: POST /v1/agent/bootstrap_tokens
operations.summary: Issue a short-lived, single-use sponsor token for agent bootstrap under the current organization

families.title: Alerts
families.description: Reference pages for Alerts endpoints.

operations.title: GET /v1/alerts/plan
operations.summary: Retrieve the public free-tier plan descriptor (included features, alert limits, and upgrade paths)

operations.title: POST /v1/alerts/signup
operations.summary: Register an email for the free alerts tier (idempotent lead capture)

families.title: Analytics
families.description: Tenant-safe analytical query workflows over supported Datastream history datasets.

operations.title: POST /v1/analytics/query
operations.summary: Run a tenant-safe analytical query over supported SEC API history datasets without exposing raw SQL

families.title: Artifacts
families.description: Artifact creation, retrieval, manifests, and download/reconcile workflows.

operations.title: GET /v1/artifacts
operations.summary: List canonical artifacts for the current organization

operations.title: POST /v1/artifacts
operations.summary: Create and persist a derived artifact bundle

operations.title: GET /v1/artifacts/{artifact_id}
operations.summary: Fetch persisted artifact metadata

operations.title: GET /v1/artifacts/{artifact_id}/download
operations.summary: Download or redirect to the persisted artifact payload

operations.title: GET /v1/artifacts/{artifact_id}/export
operations.summary: Export an artifact as structured JSON or a markdown-oriented download envelope

operations.title: GET /v1/artifacts/{artifact_id}/manifest
operations.summary: Fetch the structured manifest for a persisted artifact

operations.title: POST /v1/artifacts/{artifact_id}/reconcile
operations.summary: Reconcile artifact metadata with object storage and upload if needed

operations.title: GET /v1/artifacts/summary
operations.summary: Return artifact lifecycle counts by kind, status, and storage mode

families.title: Board
families.description: Board composition and director-level governance surfaces derived from SEC proxy disclosures.

operations.title: GET /v1/board
operations.summary: Return the latest board composition derived from definitive proxy filings with director roster and committee coverage semantics

families.title: Companies
families.description: Reference pages for Companies endpoints.

operations.title: GET /v1/companies/balance-sheets
operations.summary: Return SEC XBRL-derived balance sheets for a ticker with normalized debt, equity, and cash fields. Covers us-gaap (10-K/10-Q) and IFRS foreign-private-issuer (20-F/6-K) filers automatically.

operations.title: GET /v1/companies/cash-flow-statements
operations.summary: Return SEC XBRL-derived cash flow statements for a ticker with free-cash-flow and dividend enrichment. Covers us-gaap (10-K/10-Q) and IFRS foreign-private-issuer (20-F/6-K) filers automatically.

operations.title: GET /v1/companies/financials
operations.summary: Return combined SEC XBRL-derived income, balance-sheet, and cash-flow statements for a ticker. Covers us-gaap (10-K/10-Q) and IFRS foreign-private-issuer (20-F/6-K) filers automatically.

operations.title: GET /v1/companies/income-statements
operations.summary: Return SEC XBRL-derived income statements for a ticker with EBITDA and share-count enrichment. Covers us-gaap (10-K/10-Q) and IFRS foreign-private-issuer (20-F/6-K) filers automatically.

operations.title: GET /v1/companies/macro-exposure
operations.summary: Return revenue-weighted macro sensitivities for a single company: geographic revenue segments crossed with the country macro plane, with per-indicator beta, direction, confidence, and a coverage percentage that degrades gracefully when segments are unavailable

operations.title: GET /v1/companies/overview
operations.summary: Return a first-party SEC company overview — a due-diligence briefing combining identity/classification (name, CIK, tickers, sector/industry from SIC, state of incorporation, exchange, former names) with the latest material filing and a sector-aware financial snapshot derived from multi-year annual SEC XBRL facts. A companyType discriminator (operating / financial_institution / pre_revenue) drives which metrics are valid: financial institutions null gross/operating margin and free cash flow and lean on net margin, ROE, ROA, book value, and total assets. The revenue concept is recency-selected (the candidate whose latest fiscal year is most recent wins) so deprecated tags and wrong sub-lines never win. The base overview is intentionally light; pass include=segments,footnotes,dilution,factors to attach opt-in, bounded enrichments (footnotes is returned as a reference link rather than rendered inline; factors is a quantified, time-ranged quant factor-exposure snapshot — an exposure snapshot, not a forecast). Ships beta. Requires ticker or cik.

operations.title: GET /v1/companies/ratios
operations.summary: Return profitability, return, valuation, dividend, and leverage ratios derived from SEC XBRL statements plus market context

operations.title: GET /v1/companies/segments
operations.summary: Return a multi-axis, revenue-anchored business breakdown (Business Breakdown). Groups SEC XBRL segment facts into the canonical product, geographic, and operating axes, de-subtotals each axis against total reported revenue, and emits per-segment revenue share, profit/loss, margin, and YoY growth. Each axis is flagged reported or low_confidence based on whether it ties to total revenue (banks, REITs, and insurers typically do not tie). Ships beta. Requires ticker or cik.

operations.title: GET /v1/companies/subsidiaries
operations.summary: Return the list of subsidiaries extracted from the latest 10-K Exhibit 21 for a given entity

families.title: Compensation
families.description: Compensation and governance-oriented executive pay workflows.

operations.title: GET /v1/compensation
operations.summary: Return normalized executive compensation records derived from the latest DEF 14A filing

operations.title: POST /v1/compensation/compare
operations.summary: Compare the latest two executive compensation disclosures for an issuer

families.title: Delivery
families.description: Reference pages for Delivery endpoints.

operations.title: GET /v1/delivery/events
operations.summary: List durable Delivery ledger, webhook delivery, and stream records for the current organization

operations.title: GET /v1/delivery/events/export
operations.summary: Export durable Delivery ledger records as JSON or NDJSON

operations.title: GET /v1/delivery/unsubscribe
operations.summary: Render an unsubscribe confirmation page for a signed token

operations.title: POST /v1/delivery/unsubscribe

operations.title: GET /v1/dilution/cash-position

operations.title: GET /v1/dilution/coverage

operations.title: GET /v1/dilution/nasdaq-compliance

operations.title: GET /v1/dilution/ratings

operations.title: GET /v1/dilution/reverse-splits

operations.title: GET /v1/dilution/rofr

operations.title: GET /v1/dilution/score

operations.title: GET /v1/dilution/share-float-history

operations.title: GET /v1/dilution/warrants
operations.summary: List warrant schedules parsed from offering exhibits with price-protection and ratchet clauses

families.description: SEC-furnished earnings materials, coverage state, and transcript-adjacent filing extracts.

operations.title: GET /v1/earnings/transcripts
operations.summary: Return SEC-furnished earnings materials from 8-K filings with release, remarks, and transcript coverage states

families.title: Factors

operations.title: GET /v1/factors/catalog

operations.title: GET /v1/factors/extreme-moves

operations.title: GET /v1/factors/regime-performance

operations.title: GET /v1/factors/related-stocks
operations.summary: Return related stocks ranked by factor-overlap similarity for peer discovery and hedge ideation

operations.title: GET /v1/factors/returns
operations.summary: Return factor return history, z-scores, and volatility-scaled series for supported factor families

operations.title: GET /v1/factors/returns/intraday
operations.summary: Return intraday factor snapshots for dashboards using the current benchmark proxy surface and freshness metadata

operations.title: GET /v1/factors/similarity-pack

operations.title: GET /v1/factors/sparklines
operations.summary: Return compact multi-factor sparkline series with 1D through MAX summary windows for dashboard, sector, index, and model UIs

operations.title: GET /v1/factors/valuations
operations.summary: Return valuation-factor opportunity signals ranked from SecAPI-owned factor return state with trust metadata

operations.title: GET /v1/factors/valuations/stocks

families.title: Facts
families.description: Reference pages for Facts endpoints.

operations.title: GET /v1/facts
operations.summary: Return normalized SEC company facts for an issuer, concept, and optional form or unit. Defaults to the us-gaap taxonomy (10-K/10-Q); when no explicit taxonomy or form is supplied and the us-gaap lookup is empty, automatically falls back to ifrs-full on 20-F/6-K for foreign private issuers (e.g. SAP, TM, SONY, RIO).

operations.summary: Search filing manifests with historical filters, accession lookup semantics, sorting, and cursor pagination

operations.title: GET /v1/filings/{accession_number}
operations.summary: Retrieve a filing manifest by accession number from the materialized filing corpus

operations.title: GET /v1/filings/{accession_number}/download

operations.title: GET /v1/filings/{accession_number}/export

operations.title: GET /v1/filings/{accession_number}/sections/{section_key}

operations.title: GET /v1/filings/events
operations.summary: Persisted AI-tagged 8-K/6-K filing feed (StockInsights-style ai_insights). Cursor-paginated, replayable, one durable row per tagged filing.

operations.title: GET /v1/filings/guidance

operations.title: GET /v1/filings/latest
operations.summary: Retrieve the latest filing for an entity and form

operations.title: GET /v1/filings/latest/render
operations.summary: Render the latest filing into Markdown-like text

operations.title: GET /v1/filings/latest/risk-categories
operations.summary: Return deterministic Item 1A risk-category coverage for the latest covered filing of an issuer

operations.title: GET /v1/filings/latest/sections/{section_key}
operations.summary: Extract a section from the latest filing for an entity and form

operations.title: GET /v1/filings/pension-benefit-schedule
operations.summary: Return structured expected pension and retiree benefit payments for a target year when the filing discloses the schedule in rendered tables

operations.title: GET /v1/filings/transcripts
operations.summary: Persisted earnings-transcript store: speaker attribution, prepared-remarks/Q&A segmentation, and summaries extracted from EX-99 materials.

operations.title: GET /v1/forms/1-a

operations.title: GET /v1/forms/npx

families.title: Fund Letters
families.description: Reference pages for Fund Letters endpoints.

operations.title: GET /v1/fund-letters
operations.summary: List investor letters from hedge funds, partnerships, and registered funds, filterable by manager, fund, company, period, source, and distribution tier.

operations.title: GET /v1/fund-letters/{letter_id}
operations.summary: Retrieve one letter with letter-level narratives, performance figures, and inline theses (capped at 25; thesisCount carries the total). Superseded/merged IDs resolve forever via aliases.

operations.title: GET /v1/fund-letters/{letter_id}/document
operations.summary: Retrieve the original letter document (format=pdf, 302 redirect) or page-segmented markdown whose bytes verify every anchor (format=markdown).

operations.title: GET /v1/fund-letters/changes
operations.summary: Keyset-paginated delta feed of fund-letter events (letter.published, letter.updated, letter.superseded, thesis.extracted, manager.added). Never response-cached.

operations.title: GET /v1/fund-letters/companies
operations.summary: Company coverage index: every company with at least one extracted thesis, with thesis/manager/letter counts and the latest stance.

operations.title: GET /v1/fund-letters/funds
operations.summary: List funds that publish letters, with per-fund letter counts.

operations.title: GET /v1/fund-letters/funds/{fund_id}
operations.summary: Retrieve one fund. Merged fund IDs resolve forever via aliases; the response carries the canonical id plus requestedId when they differ.

operations.title: GET /v1/fund-letters/managers
operations.summary: List letter-publishing managers (firms) with coverage stats: letters, funds, companies, theses, period range, and cadence.

operations.title: GET /v1/fund-letters/managers/{manager_id}
operations.summary: Retrieve one manager profile. Merged manager IDs resolve forever via aliases; the response carries the canonical id plus requestedId when they differ.

operations.title: GET /v1/fund-letters/managers/{manager_id}/overview
operations.summary: Fund Overview: one token-efficient briefing per manager — canonical name, description, founders, website, coverage counts, and the latest letter's highlights with up to 5 headline theses.

operations.title: GET /v1/fund-letters/search
operations.summary: Full-text search over letter bodies; hits carry page-anchored highlights.

operations.title: GET /v1/fund-letters/semantic
operations.summary: Semantic (vector) search over letter content; hits carry similarity scores, matched chunks, and page anchors.

operations.title: GET /v1/fund-letters/theses
operations.summary: Cross-cutting thesis screen: structured per-company extractions (relationship, stance, conviction, narratives, verbatim anchored quotes) across all letters.

operations.title: GET /v1/funds/nport/holdings
operations.summary: Return the latest SEC N-PORT holdings roster with explicit capability semantics and balance-unit metadata

families.title: Intelligence

operations.title: GET /v1/intelligence/earnings-preview
operations.summary: Return an earnings preview bundle with estimates, drivers, risks, and traceable supporting context

operations.summary: Compile an allocator prompt into a deterministic one-call intelligence workload with compact traced output

operations.title: GET /v1/intelligence/query/{jobId}
operations.summary: Poll an async intelligence workload until the final traced result is ready

operations.title: GET /v1/intelligence/security
operations.summary: Return a one-call security bundle with snapshot, catalysts, filings, and factor context

operations.title: POST /v1/intelligence/watchlist
operations.summary: Return a watchlist briefing bundle with movers, catalysts, factor context, and regime overlays

operations.title: GET /v1/macro/releases

operations.title: GET /v1/macro/search

operations.title: GET /v1/market/search

operations.title: GET /v1/market/snapshots
operations.summary: Return persisted latest-market snapshots for one or more securities with freshness, rights, and revision metadata

operations.summary: Return model factor analysis for submitted Model Builder or saved-model holdings with optional attribution, hedge, and optimizer sections

families.title: Monitors
families.description: Reference pages for Monitors endpoints.

operations.title: GET /v1/monitors
operations.summary: List saved-search monitors for the current organization

operations.title: POST /v1/monitors
operations.summary: Create a saved-search monitor with optional webhook or email delivery destination

operations.title: GET /v1/monitors/{monitor_id}
operations.summary: Retrieve a single monitor by id

operations.title: GET /v1/news/search
operations.summary: Search rights-safe news coverage and issuer communications by symbol, entity, or topic

operations.title: GET /v1/news/stories
operations.summary: Return rights-safe news stories with entity tagging, provenance, and source-rights metadata

families.title: Offerings

operations.title: GET /v1/offerings
operations.summary: Return S-1 registration statements and 424B prospectuses with issuer, form, date, and cursor filters

families.title: Ownership
families.description: Institutional and beneficial ownership surfaces for managers, holders, and ticker-centric analysis.

operations.title: GET /v1/owners/13d-13g
operations.summary: List beneficial ownership reports across the SEC-native 13D and 13G filing families

operations.title: GET /v1/owners/13f
operations.summary: Return the latest normalized 13F ownership report for a manager CIK, with optional quarter-specific selection

operations.title: POST /v1/owners/13f/compare
operations.summary: Compare the latest two parsable 13F ownership reports for a manager CIK

operations.title: GET /v1/owners/13f/filings
operations.summary: List recent 13F filings, including quarter-end report dates, for a manager CIK

operations.title: GET /v1/owners/institutional/extract
operations.summary: Return a quarter-specific historical institutional ownership extract for a manager CIK over the SEC-native 13F family

operations.title: GET /v1/owners/institutional/investor
operations.summary: Return an investor-centric institutional ownership graph for a manager CIK, including ranked holdings and quarter-over-quarter changes

operations.title: GET /v1/owners/institutional/ticker
operations.summary: Return a ticker-centric institutional holder graph for the latest materialized 13F cohort, ranked by disclosed position value

families.title: Platform
families.description: Identity, org, auth metadata, usage, billing, events, and platform posture endpoints.

operations.title: GET /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server
operations.summary: Return or proxy OAuth authorization server metadata for the configured WorkOS tenant

operations.title: GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource
operations.summary: Return OAuth protected resource metadata for hosted MCP and API clients

operations.title: POST /mcp
operations.summary: Hosted MCP transport endpoint

operations.title: GET /v1/api_keys
operations.summary: List API keys for the current organization

operations.title: POST /v1/api_keys
operations.summary: Create a new API key for the current organization and reveal its secret exactly once

operations.title: GET /v1/billing
operations.summary: Return the current organization's billing snapshot, including pricing posture, budget controls, and settlement provider state

operations.title: PUT /v1/billing/budget
operations.summary: Update organization-level spend caps, soft caps, and approval thresholds for PAYG usage

operations.title: POST /v1/billing/checkout
operations.summary: Create a Stripe Checkout session for a self-serve Personal or Team SEC API plan

operations.title: GET /v1/billing/credits
operations.summary: Return the current organization's prepaid credit balance, auto-top-up settings, lifetime totals, and low-balance status

operations.title: PUT /v1/billing/credits/auto-topup
operations.summary: Enable or disable automatic prepaid-credit top-ups and set the low-balance threshold and refill amount

operations.title: POST /v1/billing/credits/refund
operations.summary: Refund the unspent credits of a prepaid top-up to the original payment method, within the refund window (platform fees non-refundable)

operations.title: POST /v1/billing/credits/topup
operations.summary: Create a Stripe PaymentIntent to purchase prepaid credits, returning the client secret and the discount/fee charge breakdown

operations.title: GET /v1/billing/credits/transactions
operations.summary: List the current organization's prepaid credit ledger entries (top-ups, debits, refunds, grants, adjustments), newest first

operations.title: POST /v1/billing/grant/reset
operations.summary: Re-grant the one-time free starter allowance (resets free-grant usage), rate-limited to once per rolling 30 days per organization

operations.title: POST /v1/billing/payg/enable
operations.summary: Enable pay-as-you-go in one flow: save a card, make an initial credit top-up, and optionally turn on auto-top-up (returns a PaymentIntent client secret)

operations.title: GET /v1/billing/payment-methods
operations.summary: List the current organization's saved payment methods, primary first

operations.title: PUT /v1/billing/payment-methods/{id}
operations.summary: Set a saved payment method as primary and/or change its auto-top-up fallback priority

operations.title: DELETE /v1/billing/payment-methods/{id}
operations.summary: Remove a saved payment method from the current organization

operations.title: POST /v1/billing/payment-methods/setup-intent
operations.summary: Create a Stripe SetupIntent to save a payment method off-session for top-ups and auto-top-up (max 3 per organization)

operations.title: POST /v1/billing/portal
operations.summary: Create a Stripe Billing Portal session for the current organization

operations.title: POST /v1/billing/quote
operations.summary: Quote a billable workflow or meter class against the current billing plan and budget gates

operations.title: GET /v1/billing/rates
operations.summary: Return the public pricing catalog, starter grant metadata, plan metadata, and meter-family launch rates

operations.title: GET /v1/billing/stripe-config
operations.summary: Return the current organization's Stripe publishable-key configuration for browser payment setup

operations.title: POST /v1/billing/webhooks/stripe
operations.summary: Receive and process signed Stripe subscription lifecycle webhooks

operations.title: GET /v1/limits
operations.summary: Return the current organization's effective plan, billing state, and route quota windows

operations.title: GET /v1/me
operations.summary: Return the current authenticated principal and organization context

operations.title: GET /v1/org
operations.summary: Return the current organization profile

families.title: Portfolio
families.description: Reference pages for Portfolio endpoints.

operations.title: POST /v1/portfolio/analyze
operations.summary: Return factor exposures, attribution, and hedge suggestions for a portfolio in one deterministic response

operations.title: POST /v1/portfolio/attribution
operations.summary: Return factor return attribution for a portfolio with explained return, residual/unexplained return, and compact contribution rows

operations.title: POST /v1/portfolio/hedge
operations.summary: Return bounded benchmark-instrument factor hedge candidates for a portfolio with compact residual exposure and trust metadata

operations.title: POST /v1/portfolio/optimize
operations.summary: Return bounded factor-aware optimizer scenario candidates for factor-neutral, min-drawdown, or regime-aware objectives

operations.title: POST /v1/portfolio/risk
operations.summary: Return ex-ante portfolio risk: tracking error, CTEV by factor group and by security, ex-ante beta, and the factor-vs-idiosyncratic split, labelled with model coverage

operations.title: POST /v1/portfolio/stress-test
operations.summary: Run portfolio stress scenarios across factor and macro shock definitions with compact traceable outputs

families.title: Search
families.description: Reference pages for Search endpoints.

operations.title: GET /v1/search/fulltext
operations.summary: Full-text search across filing content and section text

operations.title: GET /v1/search/semantic
operations.summary: Semantic vector search across SEC filing section content with finance-tuned embeddings, hybrid keyword + vector RRF, and citation fields on every result row

families.title: Sections
families.description: Search and extract filing sections, items, and snippets.

operations.title: GET /v1/sections/search
operations.summary: Search filing sections and snippets with filing-scoped filters and cursor pagination

families.title: Signals
families.description: Derived public-market signals such as the OMNI Volatility Score.

operations.title: GET /v1/signals/dilution
operations.summary: Return the SEC API Dilution Score: factor-weighted 0-100 derived metric with sub-ratings, percentile, and optional rolling history

operations.title: GET /v1/signals/dilution/enhanced
operations.summary: Return the SEC API Dilution Score augmented with factor-model context (macro liquidity regime, momentum exposure, short-interest placeholder)

operations.title: GET /v1/signals/volatility
operations.summary: Return the SEC API volatility score with transparent factor breakdown and freshness metadata

families.title: Situations
families.description: Reference pages for Situations endpoints.

operations.title: GET /v1/situations
operations.summary: List durable special situations (M&A, tender offers, going-private, spin-offs, activist campaigns, restructuring, bankruptcy, …) with lifecycle status, deal terms, and market snapshot.

operations.title: GET /v1/situations/{situation_id}
operations.summary: Retrieve a single situation with its full per-filing timeline (oldest first)

operations.title: GET /v1/situations/{situation_id}/export
operations.summary: Render a source-cited Markdown Copy-for-LLM brief for one situation

operations.title: GET /v1/situations/{situation_id}/filings
operations.summary: Retrieve a situation's per-filing timeline as a paginated sub-resource (oldest first)

operations.title: GET /v1/situations/{situation_id}/summary
operations.summary: Retrieve a compact situation summary: rendered markdown, deal terms, and the latest timeline event

operations.title: GET /v1/situations/{situation_id}/underwriting-pack
operations.summary: Retrieve a deterministic, source-cited underwriting pack with canonical detail, filing timeline, and Copy-for-LLM markdown

operations.title: GET /v1/situations/by-form/{form}
operations.summary: List special situations opened or advanced by a given EDGAR form type (e.g. SC 13D, SC TO-T, 425, DEFM14A). The form is expanded to the situation types it triggers.

operations.title: GET /v1/situations/calendar
operations.summary: Upcoming situation key dates (record, vote, expiry, expected close) within a horizon of up to 365 days

operations.title: GET /v1/situations/feed
operations.summary: Reverse-chronological feed of situation events, each enriched with its parent situation summary

operations.title: GET /v1/situations/feed.rss
operations.summary: Paid authenticated RSS feed of situation events

operations.title: GET /v1/situations/issues
operations.summary: List immutable, numbered weekly Special Situations Digest issues

operations.title: GET /v1/situations/issues/{issue}
operations.summary: Retrieve one immutable weekly Special Situations Digest issue by number or slug

operations.title: GET /v1/situations/performance
operations.summary: Closed-situation outcome cohorts: completion rate, median days to close, average premium, terminated/expired counts

operations.title: GET /v1/situations/stats
operations.summary: Situation counts by type, status, sector, and market-cap bucket over an optional window

families.title: Statements
families.description: Read normalized statement bundles, facts, and segmented revenue surfaces.

operations.title: GET /v1/statements
operations.summary: Return a normalized statement backed by SEC company facts. Resolves us-gaap (10-K/10-Q) filers and IFRS foreign private issuers (ifrs-full on 20-F/6-K) automatically.

operations.title: GET /v1/statements/{statement_key}
operations.summary: Return a specific normalized statement keyed by statement type. Resolves us-gaap (10-K/10-Q) and IFRS foreign-private-issuer (20-F/6-K) filers automatically.

operations.title: GET /v1/statements/all
operations.summary: Return the balance sheet, income statement, and cash flow statement as one normalized bundle. Resolves us-gaap (10-K/10-Q) and IFRS foreign-private-issuer (20-F/6-K) filers automatically.

operations.title: GET /v1/statements/segmented-facts
operations.summary: Return filing-derived segmented fact history for supported metrics such as revenue and segment profit/loss, with product or geography dimensions, hierarchy metadata, capability state, and trace references when issuers disclose them

operations.title: GET /v1/statements/segmented-revenues
operations.summary: Return filing-derived segmented revenue history with XBRL product or geography dimensions, capability state, and trace references when issuers disclose them

operations.title: GET /v1/statements/share-float
operations.summary: Return a share-float wrapper backed by SEC company facts, including disclosed public float when available and shares-outstanding fallback semantics otherwise

families.title: Stocks
families.description: Reference pages for Stocks endpoints.

operations.title: GET /v1/stocks/{ticker}/loadings
operations.summary: Return stock-level factor loadings for a single ticker using the latest stored exposure model

families.title: Strategies
families.description: Reference pages for Strategies endpoints.

operations.title: POST /v1/strategies/factor-rotation
operations.summary: Return factor-rotation research scenarios informed by macro regime context and factor state

families.title: Stream
families.description: Reference pages for Stream endpoints.

operations.title: POST /v1/stream/tickets
operations.summary: Mint a short-lived signed WebSocket stream ticket for the current principal

operations.title: GET /v1/stream/ws
operations.summary: Upgrade to a WebSocket connection for delivery event streaming

families.title: Streams
families.description: Stream subscription creation and event polling for replay-safe event delivery.

operations.title: GET /v1/stream_subscriptions
operations.summary: List stream subscriptions for the current organization

operations.title: POST /v1/stream_subscriptions
operations.summary: Create a stream subscription for event polling and replay

operations.title: PATCH /v1/stream_subscriptions/{stream_id}
operations.summary: Update a stream subscription description, event types, transport, or status

operations.title: DELETE /v1/stream_subscriptions/{stream_id}
operations.summary: Delete a stream subscription while preserving delivery records

operations.title: POST /v1/stream_subscriptions/{stream_id}/disable
operations.summary: Disable a stream subscription without deleting its delivery records

operations.title: POST /v1/stream_subscriptions/{stream_id}/enable
operations.summary: Enable a stream subscription

operations.title: GET /v1/stream_subscriptions/{stream_id}/events
operations.summary: Poll canonical stream events for a subscription with cursor semantics

families.title: Traces
families.description: Trace hydration, filing page anchors, and source-to-derived lineage workflows. Traces cover filing-derived data (segmented revenues, section excerpts), SEC enforcement actions, market price snapshots, and analyst estimates.

operations.title: GET /v1/traces
operations.summary: Batch resolve shared trace records by trace identifier across filing-derived and supported non-filing datasets

operations.title: GET /v1/traces/{trace_id}
operations.summary: Resolve a single shared trace record by trace identifier across filing-derived and supported non-filing datasets

families.title: Webhooks
families.description: Signed webhook endpoint, delivery history, replay, and secret rotation workflows.

operations.title: GET /v1/webhook_endpoints
operations.summary: List webhook endpoints for the current organization

operations.title: POST /v1/webhook_endpoints
operations.summary: Create a signed webhook endpoint for Delivery events

operations.title: PATCH /v1/webhook_endpoints/{webhook_id}
operations.summary: Update a webhook endpoint URL, description, subscribed event types, or active status

operations.title: DELETE /v1/webhook_endpoints/{webhook_id}
operations.summary: Delete a webhook endpoint while preserving delivery audit history

operations.title: GET /v1/webhook_endpoints/{webhook_id}/deliveries
operations.summary: List canonical delivery attempts for a webhook endpoint

operations.title: POST /v1/webhook_endpoints/{webhook_id}/deliveries/{delivery_id}/replay
operations.summary: Replay a stored webhook delivery attempt by re-emitting its source event to the endpoint

operations.title: POST /v1/webhook_endpoints/{webhook_id}/disable
operations.summary: Disable a webhook endpoint without deleting delivery history

operations.title: POST /v1/webhook_endpoints/{webhook_id}/enable
operations.summary: Enable a webhook endpoint

operations.title: POST /v1/webhook_endpoints/{webhook_id}/rotate_secret
operations.summary: Rotate the signing secret for a webhook endpoint

operations.title: POST /v1/webhook_endpoints/{webhook_id}/test
operations.summary: Send a signed webhook.test event to a webhook endpoint

agent_guidance: Use the x-api-key header for REST, SDK, CLI, and server-to-server MCP calls.
Resolve entities before downstream filing, ownership, facts, or statement calls.
Preserve requestId, traceparent, accession number, CIK, filing date, source URL, and freshness metadata.
Prefer compact or structured endpoints before raw filing text when building agent loops.
Check billing and limits before high-fanout workflows.
